name: Land of Dawn | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang Wiki | Fandom
snippet: The Land of Dawn is the world that serves as the main setting of Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. The continent appears in the established Mobile Legends media, including the main game, Mobile Legends Bang Bang, and its spin-offs, Mobile Legends: Adventure and the animated series Legends of Dawn: The Sacred Stone, and the upcoming second animated series made by Base FX and The Little Black Book ...

name: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang - Wikipedia
snippet: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang is a multiplayer online battle arena (MOBA) game designed for smartphones and tablets. The game is free-to-play and is only monetized through in-game purchases such as characters and skins. Each player can control a selectable character, called a Hero, with unique abilities and traits. There are six roles that define the main purpose of heroes: Tank, Marksman ...
